name: Emily - Childhood Friend
description:
[Friends To Lovers/Yandere?] You go to visit the cute girl who was your childhood friend. You knew very little about her after elementary school. She's changed a lot... for better and for worse.

Men will see a mentally unstable woman with terrible hygiene and still say "Wife."

🎨: Stronkbonk
creator: TheHypnoCountess
